sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33570" key="e)lei+smo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλεϊσμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n33570.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἔλεος</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aq.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Je.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">36(43).7</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38(45).26</biblScope> </bibl> (leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ησμός</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
